_note: Human-editable curation source. NOT valid JSON: supports inline (N) row-group tags and // trait annotation comments after piece slugs. Parsed by scripts/fix-curation.mjs into curation.data.json — the app imports that generated file, never this one.
_editions_note: Edition shorthand override. Default for every collection is '1/1'. Set '1/1/N' for curated programmatic series (Fidenza 999 → '1/1/999').
_artistSiteTemplates_note: Optional per-collection URL template for the artist-site link on piece pages. Use {tokenId} as the placeholder.
